_comment: R1 verification manifest — minimal remote plug-in to test whether vSphere Client 9.0/9.1 renders a self-shipped zh-CN locale. SCHEMA NOTE: exact field names/structure must be reconciled against the official 9.0 remote plug-in sample's plugin.json before production use (see HLD R1 / open questions). Fields below follow the documented behavior: a locale-keyed resource map drives plug-in chrome strings.

i18n._comment: Locale-keyed resources. en is the fallback baseline; zh-CN is the locale under test. Per docs the resource map keys are locales and values are { messageKey: message }.
